query: SELECT ul.id, ul.user_id, ul.latitude, ul.longitude, ul.is_sharing, ul.last_updated, p.trainer_name FROM user_locations ul LEFT JOIN profiles p ON ul.user_id = p.user_id ORDER BY ul.last_updated DESC LIMIT 20;
